title: verify-measurement output
description: stdout JSON produced by `tinfoil-conformance verify-measurement`. SPEC §7 verdict.

source_fingerprint_hex.description: Lowercase-hex fingerprint of `source` per SPEC §7.2. Single-register: raw register value. Multi-register: SHA-256 of (source.type || join(registers, '')).

target_fingerprint_hex.description: Lowercase-hex fingerprint of `target` per SPEC §7.2, when target was supplied; null otherwise.

code.description: SPEC-anchored rejection code. UNKNOWN: predicate type URI not in §2.3. REGISTER_COUNT_INVALID: register array length doesn't match the count §7.1 requires for the type. TYPE_COMBINATION_UNSUPPORTED: source/target combo not covered by §7.3.1–§7.3.4 (§7.3.5). MISMATCH: registers compare unequal. RTMR3_NONZERO: TDX target's registers[4] != RTMR3_ZERO when comparing MultiPlatform→TDX (§7.3.2).

spec_ref.description: Optional SPEC.md section the failing check is anchored to.
